description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The stylish dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance - perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Case diameter: 32 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsStainless steel case with a black bezelRubber straps with a tang claspBlack dial with branding at the 7 hour markDate aperture at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for durabilityWater resistant upto 50 meters
